description_long: This is a rectangular library building with a prominent red and yellow roof, featuring a modernist architectural style. The front facade is defined by a series of tall, vertical windows set between brick columns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The entrance is approached via a wide paved plaza with geometric landscaping, including patterned garden beds and walkways. The side elevations reveal a stepped roofline and additional windows, while the rear is more utilitarian with fewer openings. The roof is mostly flat with a raised yellow section, possibly housing a skylight or mechanical area. The building's exterior is primarily composed of brick and concrete, with metal and glass elements for windows and doors.
description: A modernist library with a red and yellow roof, tall vertical windows, and a landscaped plaza at the front. The structure features brick facades, geometric garden beds, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, tall vertical windows, and landscaped plaza with patterned garden beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped red roof, yellow central roof section, and additional windows along the brick facade.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full extent of the red and yellow roof, as well as the building's rectangular footprint and surrounding plaza.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear and side facades, with fewer windows and continued geometric landscaping.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features vertical brick columns separating tall glass windows, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms. The landscaping in front adds visual interest with patterned garden beds and paved walkways.
attribute_entryway_design: A wide, recessed entryway with glass doors set between brick columns, accessed via a broad paved plaza.
attribute_window_arrangement: Tall vertical windows arranged in regular rows along the front facade, with additional smaller windows distributed along the sides.
